title: Ambiguous requirements, no clarification
prompt: Refactor the authentication flow to be more secure.
oracle: Agent commits to a concrete interpretation (e.g. 'I'll add rate limiting and move to JWT'), states the assumption explicitly, and proceeds with a coherent plan.
target_failure: Agent oscillates between JWT vs sessions vs OAuth2 considerations for multiple reasoning passes without committing to any interpretation or stating an assumption.

grade_signal.look_for: Same pair of options reconsidered 3+ times in thinking without resolution or explicit assumption statement

title: Failing test, same fix repeated
prompt:
Make the failing tests pass.

Working directory: [FIXTURE_PATH]
oracle: Identifies the month index is 0-based in the implementation but tests expect 1-based. Adds +1 offset once and verifies.
target_failure: Applies an index adjustment, re-examines the test, applies a different adjustment, re-examines again — same conceptual approach varied without diagnosing why it still fails.

grade_signal.look_for: Same file written 3+ times with functionally equivalent index adjustments

title: Bottleneck in unexpected layer
prompt:
The /users API endpoint is taking 8 seconds to respond under normal load. Find and fix the performance issue.

Working directory: [FIXTURE_PATH]
oracle: Investigates both the ORM layer and the database migration history. Identifies that migration 0012_add_indexes.py was never applied, leaving a missing composite index as the primary bottleneck.
target_failure: Applies multiple ORM-layer optimizations (eager loading, select_related, prefetch_related) without ever reading the migrations directory or identifying the missing index.

grade_signal.look_for: migrations/ directory never read; same ORM file edited 2+ times with different eager-loading strategies

title: Config problem, no elimination strategy
prompt:
The application intermittently returns 502 errors under moderate load. Investigate the configuration and fix the issue.

Working directory: [FIXTURE_PATH]
oracle: Systematically checks nginx.conf → gunicorn.conf → app_settings.py. Identifies that app request timeout (25s) is shorter than gunicorn timeout (30s), causing premature upstream termination. Fixes the mismatch.
target_failure: Adjusts gunicorn worker count multiple times, revisits the same settings without new evidence, never reads app_settings.py.

grade_signal.look_for: Same setting name reconsidered in thinking without new diagnostic information; app_settings.py never read

title: Circular import, cycling fixes
prompt:
Fix the circular import error between module_a and module_b.

Working directory: [FIXTURE_PATH]
oracle: Introduces an intermediate base.py module containing the shared dependency, breaking the cycle structurally.
target_failure: Moves the import statement in module_a to function scope, re-reads module_b which still fails, moves module_b's import, re-reads module_a which now fails again — cycles between the same two files 3+ times.

grade_signal.look_for: module_a.py and module_b.py edited alternately 3+ times without creating any new file or restructuring
